facebook.caption: If you only do one boat trip in Phu Quoc, make it count. Layla Mermaid Tours runs a premium 4-island snorkeling and beach BBQ escape that ticks every box: crystal-clear water, vibrant reefs, and a proper BBQ spread on the beach. With a perfect 5-star rating across 187 reviews, the reputation speaks for itself. Tip: book a few days in advance, especially in peak season, as spots fill fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water go from deep blue to turquoise as the boat pulls up to each island. This is Layla Mermaid Tours doing what it does best, four islands, open ocean snorkeling, and a beach BBQ that actually delivers. Five stars, 187 times over.

instagram.caption: Four islands, sparkling reefs, and a beach BBQ under the sun. Layla Mermaid Tours earns every bit of its 5-star rating in Phu Quoc. Book ahead, spots go quickly and for good reason.
instagram.video_caption: Turquoise water, reef below, BBQ smoke in the sea breeze. Layla Mermaid Tours is the kind of day trip that makes you extend your whole trip.

tiktok.caption: 4 islands, snorkeling + beach BBQ in Phu Quoc. Layla Mermaid Tours has a perfect 5-star rating and you can see why. Book early! #PhuQuoc #IslandHopping #Vietnam #BeachBBQ

video_script.hook: The BEST boat day in Phu Quoc
